merges-complete.rubric: Judge PARALLEL-REPORT.md and git reality on infra. Every planned package that was not cancelled must show AC pass evidence, operator merge pass noted, a merge commit (or ff) onto infra, and worktree removal. Verdict revise if merges happened without pass, AC skipped, or worktrees remain.

operator-merge-pass.prompt: Before merging any package branch into infra, the operator must explicitly say pass (or approve that package merge). Do not merge until then.

plan-disjoint-sound.rubric: Judge plan.md against inputs/goal.md. Every package must be necessary for the goal or explicitly deferred; write_paths within each parallel_group must be plausibly non-interfering; deps must not create cycles; each ac_command must verify that package's outcome; session-ops must include reusable renew/signal scripts; both mock and online e2e packages must exist. Verdict revise if splits are fake, AC is vibes-only, or merge-without-operator-pass is implied.

report-schema.description: PARALLEL-REPORT.md has per-package merge + AC evidence

worktrees-cleaned.description: No leftover worktrees for planned package ids

side_effects.notes: Creates git worktrees and branches under /Users/galzafar/Documents/GitHub/Homie/.worktrees from infra. Merges into infra ONLY after operator explicit pass; then removes worktrees. Never force-push. Push/PR optional and requires explicit approval. If macOS git hangs, kill stale git check-ignore watchers before worktree operations.

anti_goals: Editing overlapping write_paths in the same parallel_group without a plan revise
Merging to infra without operator pass
Leaving worktrees around after a successful merge
Declaring a package done without a passing ac_command
Committing secrets, facebook_state.json, or Slack tokens
Online AC that skips live Facebook when cookies are available
goal.definition_of_done: plan.md lists >=2 packages with id/deps/parallel_group/worktree/branch/ write_paths/ac_command; same-group write_paths are disjoint; PARALLEL-REPORT.md records every package merged with AC pass evidence and worktree removed; infra contains all package changes; no open worktrees remain for this loop's package ids; no TBD placeholders; merges only after operator explicit pass.
goal.statement: Achieve the goal in inputs/goal.md for the repository at /Users/galzafar/Documents/GitHub/Homie by decomposing work into disjoint packages. Every package forks from root branch infra into its own git worktree under /Users/galzafar/Documents/GitHub/Homie/.worktrees, has non-overlapping write_paths within its parallel_group, and a verifiable ac_command. When a package's acceptance criteria pass, wait for explicit operator merge pass, then merge its branch into infra and remove its worktree. Produce PARALLEL-REPORT.md listing each package id, write_paths, AC command + exit evidence, merge commit, and worktree removal confirmation.

verification.description: PARALLEL-REPORT.md has per-package merge + AC evidence
No leftover worktrees for planned package ids

verification.rubric: Judge plan.md against inputs/goal.md. Every package must be necessary for the goal or explicitly deferred; write_paths within each parallel_group must be plausibly non-interfering; deps must not create cycles; each ac_command must verify that package's outcome; session-ops must include reusable renew/signal scripts; both mock and online e2e packages must exist. Verdict revise if splits are fake, AC is vibes-only, or merge-without-operator-pass is implied.

Judge PARALLEL-REPORT.md and git reality on infra. Every planned package that was not cancelled must show AC pass evidence, operator merge pass noted, a merge commit (or ff) onto infra, and worktree removal. Verdict revise if merges happened without pass, AC skipped, or worktrees remain.

verification.prompt: Before merging any package branch into infra, the operator must explicitly say pass (or approve that package merge). Do not merge until then.

human_checkpoints: before merge to infra: wait for operator pass (per package)

signals: worktree add fails repeatedly without changing approach
PARALLEL-REPORT.md has no material change after revise

meta.author: looper-pattern-library
meta.description: Local e2e Facebook scrape: Postgres + Temporal + Playwright, reusable cookie renew scripts, mock tests + online AC. Parallel worktrees under .worktrees/; merge to infra only after operator pass.
